subject: Re: PDF
body:
doug and i had a long meeting.. it is impoerative that you meet wiht him on the library boht inside and out and hthe bathroom . the library has been elevated again,, the terrace is 40 feet wide, and simply has stairs that land in the road. AS I thought , there is no plan,  tod date as how the librarby sits on the hill. the entry sequence except for what in dougs words is a tray balanced on the mountain , with a house  on it.

JP
